title: Moju Heat Wave
lead: Moju is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.46. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Moju is characterized by high temperatures, with a CDD of 11.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 77%, and the wind speed is 5.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no cooling demand, while the CDD is high, leading to increased cooling needs.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
